name: context-bonsai
description: Compress noisy CI, build, runtime, scanner, and test logs before Codex diagnoses them.

interface.shortDescription: Compress logs before Codex diagnoses failures.
interface.longDescription: Use the ContextBonsai CLI to turn noisy CI, build, runtime, scanner, and test logs into compact diagnostic context before Codex spends tokens on them.
defaultPrompt: Compress this log with ContextBonsai, then diagnose the failure.
Use ContextBonsai to prepare the referenced CI log before analysis.
